[IMPLEMENTING GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ON SCIKIT-LEARN LOAD DIGITS DATASET WITH CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING]  
[COMPARING PERFORMANCE WITH MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL]  

[MODULE 1: DATA PREPARATION]  
LOAD DIGITS DATASET IS LOADED AND PREPARED FOR MODEL TRAINING. DATA IS SPLIT INTO TRAINING AND TEST SETS FOR CROSS-VALIDATION.  

[MODULE 2: MODEL TRAINING]  
GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL IS TRAINED ON TRAINING DATA. HYPERPARAMETERS ARE TUNED USING GRID SEARCH CV. MODEL IS EVALUATED ON TEST DATA.  

[MODULE 3: PERFORMANCE COMPARISON]  
GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE THAN MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL WITH RESPECT TO ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE.  

[MODULE 4: CONCLUSION]  
CURRENT MODEL SHOWS CURRENTLY BEST PERFORMANCE. CURRENT MODEL IS RECOMMENDED FOR THIS TASK.
